name: diag-perf-error
description: Click Perf, catch console errors, dump DOM state.

commands: (async () => { window.__capturedErrors = []; const origErr = console.error; console.error = (...args) => { window.__capturedErrors.push(args.map(a => typeof a === 'object' ? (a?.stack || a?.message || JSON.stringify(a)) : String(a)).join(' ')); origErr.apply(console, args); }; window.addEventListener('error', e => { window.__capturedErrors.push('window.onerror: ' + (e.error?.stack || e.message)); }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /^Perf$/i.test(b.textContent || '')); btn?.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); return { clicked: !!btn, errors: window.__capturedErrors.slice(0, 10), bodyChildCount: document.body.childElementCount, rootChildCount: document.getElementById('root')?.childElementCount, perfPanel: document.querySelector('.perf-panel')?.outerHTML?.slice(0, 200) }; })()
